file sealed class RealClassWrapMockImpl : global::RealClass, global::TUnit.Mocks.IRaisable, global::TUnit.Mocks.IMockObject
{
    private readonly global::TUnit.Mocks.MockEngine<global::RealClass> _engine;
    private readonly global::RealClass _wrappedInstance;

    [global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsable(global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsableState.Never)]
    global::TUnit.Mocks.IMock? global::TUnit.Mocks.IMockObject.MockWrapper { get; set; }

    [global::System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.SetsRequiredMembers]
    internal RealClassWrapMockImpl(global::TUnit.Mocks.MockEngine<global::RealClass> engine, global::RealClass wrappedInstance) : base(default(string)!)
    {
        _engine = engine;
        _wrappedInstance = wrappedInstance;
    }

    public override string Describe()
    {
        if (_engine.TryHandleCallWithReturn<string>(0, "Describe", global::System.Array.Empty<object?>(), "", out var __result))
        {
            return __result;
        }
        return _wrappedInstance.Describe();
    }

    [global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsable(global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsableState.Never)]
    public void RaiseEvent(string eventName, object? args)
    {
        throw new global::System.InvalidOperationException($"No event named '{eventName}' exists on this mock.");
    }
}

file static class RealClassWrapMockFactory
{
    [global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.ModuleInitializer]
    internal static void Register()
    {
        global::TUnit.Mocks.MockRegistry.RegisterWrapFactory<global::RealClass>(Create);
    }

    private static global::TUnit.Mocks.Mock<global::RealClass> Create(global::TUnit.Mocks.MockBehavior behavior, global::RealClass instance)
    {
        var engine = new global::TUnit.Mocks.MockEngine<global::RealClass>(behavior);
        engine.IsWrapMock = true;
        var impl = new RealClassWrapMockImpl(engine, instance);
        engine.Raisable = impl;
        var mock = new global::TUnit.Mocks.Mock<global::RealClass>(impl, engine);
        return mock;
    }
}
